title: Widdop Glass Hanging Ornament – Pink Champagne Bottle Christmas Tree Decoration – Elegant Festive Bauble from the Whimsical Wonderland Range
features: GLASS PINK CHAMPAGNE ORNAMENT – A glamorous glass hanging decoration shaped like a pink champagne bottle, bringing festive sparkle and chic elegance to your Christmas tree.
LUXURIOUS FESTIVE DESIGN – Featuring a glossy pink finish with golden accents, this decoration captures the joy of celebration and adds a sophisticated, modern twist to traditional Christmas décor.
PREMIUM QUALITY GLASS – Made from high-quality glass with intricate painted details for a refined, delicate finish that looks stunning under warm Christmas lights.
EASY TO HANG – Comes complete with a gold hanging string for quick and secure placement on your Christmas tree, garland or festive wreath display.
WHIMSICAL WONDERLAND COLLECTION – Pair with other colourful and playful decorations from the Widdop Whimsical Wonderland range to create a bright and joyful festive display.
description: Bring a touch of sparkle and sophistication to your festive décor with this Widdop Pink Champagne Glass Hanging Ornament from the Whimsical Wonderland range. Designed to dazzle, this statement bauble is shaped like a classic bottle of pink champagne and finished with shimmering gold detailing, making it the perfect showpiece for your Christmas tree. Crafted from premium glass, this decoration captures the light beautifully, creating a soft festive glow that enhances the magic of your seasonal displays. Its delicate design celebrates celebration itself – ideal for those who love a bit of glamour during the Christmas season. Whether hung on your tree, added to a decorative garland, or displayed in a glass bowl as part of a table centrepiece, this elegant ornament makes a timeless addition to your festive collection. Perfect as a thoughtful gift for friends and family who enjoy a touch of bubbly style, this pink champagne ornament embodies the joyful spirit and cheeky charm that define the Whimsical Wonderland collection. Celebrate the season with sparkle, sophistication, and a dash of festive fun.
